tasks.title: Generate A Release Notes Digest
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited deployment notes from stdin in the format '<team>|<change type>|<summary>'. Print one line per team as '<team>: <count> changes' sorted alphabetically by team.

test_cases.input:
api|feature|Added audit logging
web|fix|Fixed checkout redirect
api|fix|Patched token refresh

search|feature|Added filters
api|fix|Patched token refresh
search|fix|Reduced latency

tasks.title: Summarize Checkout Errors From Browser Logs
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited browser console errors from stdin. Print the distinct error messages with occurrence counts as '<message>: <count>' sorted by descending count, then alphabetically for ties.

test_cases.input:
Checkout failed
Network timeout
Checkout failed

Timeout
Timeout
Auth failed
Auth failed
Auth failed

tasks.title: Roll Up Monthly Revenue From CSV
tasks.description: Read CSV rows from stdin with header month,amount. Print one line per month as '<month>,<total>' preserving the first-seen month order.

tasks.title: Roll Up Incident Ownership From Terminal Output
tasks.description: Read newline-delimited incident records from stdin in the format '<owner> <status>'. Count only records whose status is 'open' and print '<owner> <count>' sorted alphabetically by owner.

test_cases.input:
alex open
sam closed
alex open
mira open

alex open
mira open
alex closed
zoe open
mira open
zoe closed
